_note: D5 C.10 NEW example — UK secondary-school classroom 9×7 m engineered to exercise ALL THREE BS EN 12464-1:2021 §4.2.2 area purposes (task + surrounding + background) coexisting in one room. INV-13 + INV-14 + INV-15 ALL fire NON-VACUOUSLY: Z1 task em=300 lx (Table 5 education_classroom); Z2 surrounding em=150 lx (= 0.5 × 300 ratio, top of [0.3, 0.5] band per Table 6 simplified-rule); Z3 background em=100 lx (= max(300/3, 50) floor per §4.2.2.3). DALI zone scenes deliver realistic per-zone achieved values (Z1 315 lx, Z2 155 lx, Z3 105 lx) — each ≥ its target. All luminaires 600×600 LED recessed panels (MT-01). Companion to C.5 uk-open-plan-office-10x8-dali (task + surrounding) and C.9 uk-pendant-open-plan-office (task-only, suspended) — together cover the full §4.2.2 area-purpose matrix.
_d5_disclosure_note: Authored fresh by D5 sprint Task C.10 (2026-06-04). FOUR-PLACE CANONICAL DISCLOSURE: (1) this input._note declares the three-purpose intent up-front; (2) output.calculation_summary.assumptions[] carries the engineering walk; (3) output.rationale.sections[] carries the v1.7 retrofit narrative; (4) reasoning.md §D5 carries the design-judgement narrative. Honest disclosure: zone polygons are notional (no zone polygon field in IR schema); zone purpose is assigned to luminaires by row geometry — front 2 rows = Z1 task (student desks), middle row = Z2 surrounding (teacher demonstration + 500 mm transition band per §4.2.2.2), back row = Z3 background (display wall ≥3 m wide per §4.2.2.3). DALI scene dimming (per controls_protocol=DALI) delivers different effective illuminance per zone from the same physical 600×600 LED panel — engineer-of-record verifies scene levels against final commissioning report.

luminaire.type: 600x600 LED Recessed Panel — DALI-dimmable, classroom-low-glare UGR<19

photometric_ies_paths._source: Synthetic 600x600mm recessed LED panel, opal diffuser, 4000K, 4500lm classroom variant. Distribution: Lambertian per CIBSE LG7 §6.2. verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3. Cascade per photometric-analysis v1.0; engineer-of-record substitutes project IES before final design freeze.
